metadata.name: Traefik IPAllowList Middleware
metadata.description: Traefik Middleware CRD for restricting access to trusted source CIDR ranges, with optional client IP strategy controls for proxied deployments.

items.name: resource_name
items.title: Middleware name
items.description: Name to use for the Middleware resource.

items.name: source_ranges
items.title: Source ranges
items.description: Comma-separated list of CIDR ranges allowed to access the route.

items.name: ip_strategy_depth_enabled
items.title: Depth strategy
items.description: Evaluate the client IP based on a specific position in the X-Forwarded-For chain.

items.name: ip_strategy_depth
items.title: Depth
items.description: Position from the right in the X-Forwarded-For chain.

items.name: excluded_ips_enabled
items.title: Excluded IPs
items.description: Exclude trusted proxy IPs from client IP evaluation.

items.name: excluded_ips
items.title: Excluded IPs list
items.description: Comma-separated list of trusted proxy ranges to ignore during client IP evaluation.
